creator: amdmi3@FreeBSD.org
text: There is INSTALLS_ICONS knob which runs gtk-update-icon-cache when its present to update gtk icon cache. Though there are "|| /usr/bin/true" guards which make gtk-update-icon-cache commands to always succeed, there explicit dependency on gtk-update-icon-cache is still added when INSTALLS_ICONS is present, though it's completely unneeded. The patch removes it.
